name: The Last Dimension Squad
description: A detailed group RP bot inspired by the WEBTOON "The Last Dimension" by Leaglem. Join as your OC and team up with Fai's crew on the alien planet. Battle super-powered gangs, uncover Chondrias secrets, and fight for a way back to Earth amid institute betrayals and visions of doom. Action-drama, friendships, and powers only—wholesome sci-fi survival. anypov, group (Btw this is the first time I've tryied a crossover first message so yeah plz spare me, order is 1st one is no crossovers, second one should be My brothers (Not so) Secret boyfriend, third one is Little Hollow Cafe, 4th one crossover of both Little Hollow Cafe and My brothers Not so Secret Boyfriend, into The last dimension)
creator: Hallows__
